sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3747" key="a)ktinw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκτιν-ώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n3747.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">like rays</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philostr.</author> </bibl> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">V A</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.46</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
